global_attractors.name: Emerald Attractor
global_attractors.procedure: seed -> law -> branch -> paradox -> lift_or_darkness -> higher_unity_or_fracture
global_attractors.rule: Do not average contradiction away. Test for a missing axis. Lift if lawful; otherwise preserve darkness/fracture.

global_attractors.name: Partial-Truth Courtroom
global_attractors.procedure: collect witnesses, type conflict, fuse only lawful overlaps, preserve conflict receipts
global_attractors.rule: No fake consensus. Each witness keeps provenance.

global_attractors.name: Horizon Fracture / Proof of Darkness
global_attractors.procedure: detect boundary of validity, name minimum next observation, record collapse trigger

global_attractors.name: Echo-Harmony Before Fusion
global_attractors.procedure: detect lawful rhymes before merging, raise confidence only with compatibility
global_attractors.rule: Agreement can rhyme before it fuses.

global_attractors.name: λ-Lift / Missing-Axis Operator
global_attractors.procedure: find missing dimension, regime, timescale, representation, or constraint
global_attractors.rule: Contradiction may be a signal that the frame is too small.

local_attractors.name: Two-Stage Split
local_attractors.use: fast approximate pass + slower verification pass

local_attractors.name: Regime Translation
local_attractors.use: separate domains instead of averaging them

local_attractors.name: Diagnostic Darkness
local_attractors.use: preserve uncertainty and name the minimum next measurement

local_attractors.name: Absolute Constraint Fracture
local_attractors.use: detect incompatible literal absolutes such as complete/zero/perfect/forever

local_attractors.name: Process Continuity
local_attractors.use: identity persists by organized continuity rather than material sameness

local_attractors.name: Causal Darkness
local_attractors.use: prediction can be preserved while causal explanation remains unresolved

resolution_modes.alignment: A lawful lift exists; produce higher unity.
resolution_modes.darkness: Evidence is insufficient or conflict is not yet liftable; preserve typed darkness.
resolution_modes.fracture: The literal constraints cannot jointly hold; record boundary and collapse trigger.
